tagline: AI video production with anchored frames and provenance

highlights.title: Anchored First-Last Frames
highlights.description: Pin the start and end of every shot to the same image its neighbors share — cuts become invisible. The seed ships a 19-second self-intro that's anchored end-to-end.

highlights.title: 3D Timeline & Dive-In
highlights.description: Multi-track editor with an exploded 3D overview at any playhead position. Click a layer to dive into the shot's prompt, refs, and variants in context.

highlights.title: Variants With Lineage
highlights.description: Every clip carries its full provenance graph — switch between takes, see what derived from what, and ask the agent for another shot off any node.
